ddls:
CREATE TABLE "golf_cart_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golf cart model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf cart model */,
  "voltage" INTEGER /* Voltage of the golf cart battery (36V or 48V) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the golf cart model */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Production cost of the golf cart model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the golf cart model */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Whether the golf cart model is discontinued or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf cart model */,
  "battery_life_years" INTEGER /* Expected battery life in years */,
  "charging_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of battery charging (e.g., More Frequent, Less Frequent) */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of battery maintenance (e.g., More Frequent, Less Frequent) */,
  "replacement_cost" REAL /* Cost of replacing the battery */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the battery in Ah (Ampere-hours) */,
  "charging_time" REAL /* Time it takes to fully charge the battery */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Estimated annual maintenance cost of the battery */,
  "replacement_cycles" INTEGER /* Estimated number of replacement cycles for the battery */,
  "energy_efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency level (e.g., Higher, Lower) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES golf_cart_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advantages" (
  "advantage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advantage */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf cart model */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of advantage (e.g., Battery Life, Charging Frequency) */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the advantage */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the advantage (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advantage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advantages_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES golf_cart_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer feedback record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf cart model */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer providing feedback */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the customer purchased the golf cart */,
  "usage_hours" REAL /* Estimated number of hours the customer uses the golf cart per week */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Text of the customer feedback and comments */,
  "overall_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Overall satisfaction rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES golf_cart_models ("model_id")
)
